data.title: OCI Global Sells Remaining Shares of Methanex Corporation
data.description: OCI Global, trading on Euronext under the symbol OCI, disclosed the sale of its subsidiary OCI Chemicals B.V.'s 2,612,962 common shares in Methanex Corporation, equating to about 3.4% of the total shares outstanding. The transaction was announced on April 21, 2026 in Amsterdam.

data.title: Stake Partners with ACE & Company to Develop Secondary Transfer Facility for Fractional Real Estate Investments in the UAE
data.description: In an effort to boost liquidity, transparency, and investor trust in Stake’s real estate investments in the UAE, a strategic partnership has been formed between the region's top digital real estate investment platform, Stake, and ACE & Company. The joint venture was announced on April 21, 2026, in Dubai. Stake aims to improve its offerings using ACE & Company’s expertise, with the collaboration expected to drive significant growth in the sector. This move is likely to positively impact Stake’s investment numbers and could increase stakeholder confidence in the region’s real estate market.
Royal Unibrew and PepsiCo will terminate partnership in Northern Europe after current license agreements expire.

data.title: Arbitrum blocks $71M Ether linked to Kelp hack, with assistance from law enforcement, as per council member Griff Green.
data.description: Griff Green, a member of the security council at Arbitrum, stated that the group carefully considered their actions in collaboration with law enforcement and did not make the decision lightly.

data.title: Senator proposes delay of CLARITY Act Senate markup until May, citing need for more input from crypto and banking sectors.
data.description: Senator Thom Tillis of the United States stated that individuals within the cryptocurrency and banking sectors require additional time for their voices to be heard.

data.title: SKF Q1 2026: Strong margin despite volatile market conditions
data.description: In Gothenburg, Sweden, as of April 21, 2026, the net sales for Q1 2026 were reported at MSEK 21,873, a decrease from the previous period which stood at MSEK 23,966. The organic growth for this quarter was recorded at 2.4%, a significant improvement from the negative growth rate of -3.5% in the previous period. This growth was primarily fueled by an increase in organic sales within the Industrial segments, although it was partially offset by a decline in market demand for the Automotive business. The adjusted operating profit for this quarter was MSEK 2,951.
